meta.description: Official merchandise of NK Izola. Jerseys, scarves and fan wear for supporters of the club from the Slovenian coast.

footer.tagline: The official store of NK Izola. Worn by the squad, made for the supporters on the Slovenian coast.
footer.clubText: One town. One club. Support NK Izola — every purchase backs the squad.

home.heroSubtitle: Jerseys, scarves and fan wear straight from the Slovenian coast. Made for matchday — and every day after.
home.featuredEmptyBody: The squad is warming up. New merchandise lands here soon — check back shortly.
home.clubStoryBody: Izola is a fishing town that lives for its football. From the youth pitches to the first team, every jersey sold keeps the club moving forward. When you wear the blue and yellow, you carry the town with you.

matchday.title: Two teams walk out.
matchday.body: Every home fixture, the squad lines up on this same pitch with the Adriatic at their backs and the stands full of blue and yellow. Whatever you wear on the terraces, they wear on the grass.
matchday.imageAlt: NK Izola and the visiting side lined up at the centre circle before kickoff at Stadion Drvarski

onThePitch.title: Ninety minutes.
onThePitch.body1: This is what Saturday looks like in Izola — first touches, last-ditch tackles, and a town's worth of noise from the touchline. The squad gives everything for the crest, week in, week out.
onThePitch.body2: Every jersey, scarf and training top sold in this store helps keep that going — from the first team down to the youth sides chasing the same dream.
onThePitch.imageAlt: An NK Izola forward driving at a defender during a home match

fanStories.title: The moments we never forget
fanStories.body: Every shirt carries a memory. Here's what wearing the blue and yellow means to the people in the stand.

items.quote: Last minute, rain coming off the sea, and the ball drops in off the far post. The whole stand went up at once — strangers hugging like family. I still get chills walking past that goal.
My grandfather brought me to my first match in this scarf. Twenty years later I wrapped it around my own kid before kickoff. Blue and yellow runs in the family now.
We were 2–0 down at half time and nobody left. Two headers and a screamer later, the town didn't sleep that night. That's why I keep coming back.

homeContact.title: Questions?
homeContact.body: Orders, sizing, restocks or anything blue and yellow — a supporter on the other side will get back to you.

about.metaDescription: The story behind NK Izola — the football club of Izola, Slovenia. Its crest, its home at Stadion Drvarski, and the community that fills the stands.
about.heroBody: NK Izola is the football club of Izola — a small fishing town on the Slovenian coast where the sea, the sun and Saturday afternoons at Stadion Drvarski all run together.
about.crestBody1: The badge takes its colours straight from the coast: blue for the Adriatic that the town looks out on, and yellow for the sun that sits over it on a matchday afternoon. It's the same blue and yellow you'll see on the terraces at Stadion Drvarski, on training tops around town, and on every shirt in this store.
about.crestBody2: Wearing the crest means something here — it ties the first team, the youth sides and the supporters together under one badge, win or lose.
about.communityBody1: Izola isn't a big place, but on matchday it feels like the whole town shows up. The senior squad battles it out on the same pitch where the youth teams train all week, chasing the same colours and the same crest.
about.communityBody2: This store exists to back that effort. Every order helps fund kit, travel and the academy programmes that keep bringing players through from the local streets onto the pitch at Stadion Drvarski.
about.communityImageAlt: An NK Izola player driving forward past a defender during a home match
about.stadiumBody: Tucked close to the coast, Stadion Drvarski is where NK Izola has played its football for generations. No corporate boxes, no distance from the pitch — just the squad, the bench and a crowd of blue and yellow close enough to hear every shout.
about.stadiumImageAlt: NK Izola and the visiting side lined up at the centre circle before kickoff at Stadion Drvarski
about.closingBody: Whether you're from Izola, the wider coast, or just love the game, there's a place for you in the stands. Pick up your colours, follow the squad, and we'll see you at Stadion Drvarski.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the NK Izola store team — questions about orders, sizing, stock or club merchandise from the Slovenian coast.
contact.headerBody: Questions about an order, sizing, restocks or anything blue and yellow? Drop us a line — a supporter on the other side will answer.
contact.note: Every message helps us serve the supporters better. Orders and checkout are handled securely through Shopify.

form.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out! We'll get back to you within a couple of days.
form.errorMessage: Your message is a little short — add a few details.
form.errorGeneric: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.
